Pre-conditions: User is logged in as Admin
Test Steps: 1. Click on 'Admin' in the left navigation sidebar
Expected Result: The Admin User Management page is displayed with the user grid

Pre-conditions: User is on the Admin User Management page
Test Steps: 1. Click 'Add' button. 2. Select User Role. 3. Enter Employee Name. 4. Select Status. 5. Enter Username. 6. Enter Password. 7. Confirm Password. 8. Click 'Save'
Test Data: User Role: Admin, Employee Name: (Any valid employee, e.g., m), Status: Enabled, Username: accuknox_test_user, Password: TestPassword123!
Expected Result: Success message is displayed and user is redirected to the User Management page where the new user is listed

Test Steps: 1. Enter 'accuknox_test_user' in the Username search field. 2. Click 'Search'
Expected Result: The grid filters to show only the newly created user 'accuknox_test_user'

Pre-conditions: User 'accuknox_test_user' is displayed in the search results
Test Steps: 1. Click the Edit (pencil) icon for the user. 2. Change the User Role to 'ESS'. 3. Click 'Save'
Expected Result: Success message is displayed and user is returned to the grid with updated details

Pre-conditions: User is returned to the grid after editing
Test Steps: 1. Search for 'accuknox_test_user' again. 2. Verify the User Role column

Pre-conditions: User 'accuknox_test_user' is displayed in the search results
Test Steps: 1. Click the Delete (trash) icon for the user. 2. Confirm the deletion in the popup
Expected Result: Success message is displayed and the user is removed from the grid. Searching for the user returns 'No Records Found'
